name: Star Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Yellow - Cloud Island™
description:
Create a delightful scene in your kid's space by lighting up the Figural Lamp from Cloud Island™. This white table lamp showcases a drum-shape shade and a star-shaped ceramic base for a decorative look you and your kid will love. Designed with a one-way (on and off) light setting, this table lamp has a base turn knob rotary switch for easy operation.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
